message:
fix: address review feedback on SSH push/pull fallback

- Fix pluralization bug: "discrepanc(ies)" → "discrepancies"
- Add unit tests for IsSSHURL (13 cases) and extractSSHHost (8 cases)
- Accidentally committed .beads/backup/ files removed during rebase

Co-authored-by: Mitesh Ashar <miteshashar@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew

files.patch:
@@ -113,7 +113,7 @@ func CheckRemoteConsistency(repoPath string) DoctorCheck {
 	return DoctorCheck{
 		Name:     "Remote Consistency",
 		Status:   StatusWarning,
-		Message:  fmt.Sprintf("%d discrepanc(ies) found", len(issues)),
+		Message:  fmt.Sprintf("%d discrepancies found", len(issues)),
 		Detail:   strings.Join(issues, "\n"),
 		Fix:      fix,
 		Category: CategoryData,

@@ -0,0 +1,34 @@
+package doltutil
+
+import "testing"
+
+func TestIsSSHURL(t *testing.T) {
+	tests := []struct {
+		url  string
+		want bool
+	}{
+		// SSH URLs
+		{"git+ssh://git@github.com/org/repo.git", true},
+		{"ssh://git@github.com/org/repo.git", true},
+		{"git@github.com:org/repo.git", true},
+		{"git+ssh://github.com/org/repo", true},
+		{"ssh://user@host:2222/path", true},
+		{"git@bitbucket.org:team/repo.git", true},
+
+		// Non-SSH URLs
+		{"https://dolthub.com/org/repo", false},
+		{"http://localhost:50051/repo", false},
+		{"aws://[table:bucket]/db", false},
+		{"gs://bucket/db", false},
+		{"file:///local/path", false},
+		{"/absolute/local/path", false},
+		{"", false},
+	}
+	for _, tt := range tests {
+		t.Run(tt.url, func(t *testing.T) {
+			if got := IsSSHURL(tt.url); got != tt.want {
+				t.Errorf("IsSSHURL(%q) = %v, want %v", tt.url, got, tt.want)
+			}
+		})
+	}
+}
